subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him who hath drawn nigh unto God, that he may receive the fragrances of grace and be adorned thereby [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی الذی استرقی الی الله  لتاخذ  نفحات الفضل و یزینه بین
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @consolation and comfort
